title: Infosys Receives Singapore GST Penalty Order
detailed_summary: Infosys received communication from the Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore for collection of a penalty totaling SGD 97,035.90 related to Singapore GST payment for April 2025 to June 2025. The company stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: Infosys received communication for collection of a penalty from the Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore.
The total penalty was SGD 97,035.90/- and pertained to Singapore GST payment for the period April 2025 to June 2025.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Penalty pertaining to Singapore GST payment for the period April 2025 to June 2025.

important_text_spans.reason: Supports the penalty amount disclosed by Infosys.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the company's stated impact assessment.

processing_notes: Marked non-material because the disclosed penalty is small and the company explicitly stated there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities.
